subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur cast a high-potency sleep spell using a specialized magical token.
source_quote: A specialized item used by Felkur to cast a high-potency sleep spell

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur was left with four tokens remaining after using the sleep spell.
source_quote: Using it left Felkur with four tokens remaining

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur stole a powerful divination artifact originally from Mulmaster.
source_quote: A powerful item originally stolen from Mulmaster by Felkur

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur did not know what the divination artifact was when he stole it.
source_quote: who did not know what it was

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur accidentally activated the divination artifact.
source_quote: Felkur accidentally activated it

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur sold the divination artifact for 45 gold pieces.
source_quote: and then sold it for 45 gold pieces

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur's identity as the Phantom Ghost thief of Mulmaster is believed to be contained in The Lexicon of Oaths.
source_quote: expose Felkur's true identity as the Phantom Ghost thief of Mulmaster

subject: Brandyr
fact: Brandyr is a fire giant.
source_quote: the fire giant Brandyr

subject: Brandyr
fact: Brandyr's natural defenses were bypassed by Felkur's sleep spell.
source_quote: bypassed the fire giant Brandyr's natural defenses

subject: Brandyr
fact: Brandyr was unconscious and shrunken when hidden in the portable hole.
source_quote: hide the unconscious and shrunken fire giant Brandyr

subject: Brandyr
fact: Brandyr's frame was reduced by two size categories.
source_quote: shrink the fire giant Brandyr's massive frame down to a manageable size

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim cast the Reduce spell on Brandyr.
source_quote: cast twice — by Bramgrim and Daein

subject: Daein
fact: Daein cast the Reduce spell on Brandyr.
source_quote: cast twice — by Bramgrim and Daein

subject: Daein
fact: Daein used Minor Illusion to mimic the voice of the demon lord Graz'zt.
source_quote: mimic the terrifying voice of the demon lord Graz'zt

subject: Daein
fact: Daein used Minor Illusion to mimic the voice of High Inquisitor Veris.
source_quote: mimic the voice of High Inquisitor Veris

subject: Daein
fact: Daein used Telekinetic Movement to pull the runic key across the dining table.
source_quote: Used by Daein to silently pull the runic key across the obsidian dining table

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas used Nature's Veil to become invisible as a bonus action.
source_quote: A ranger ability used by Akritas to become invisible as a bonus action

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas approached the incapacitated giant and the cambion guards undetected.
source_quote: allowing her to approach the incapacitated giant and the cambion guards undetected

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas cast Pass Without Trace to boost the party's stealth.
source_quote: Cast by Akritas to provide a significant boost to the entire party's stealth

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas used Pass Without Trace to mask movements and sounds while retreating from the Six-Fingered Courtyard.
source_quote: as they retreated from the Six-Fingered Courtyard

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen carried a runic key that grants access to the upper vaults of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: A key carried by Vraxen that grants access to the upper vaults of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen was tricked into believing a conspiracy was afoot between Veris and General Veperyd.
source_quote: tricking Vraxen into believing a conspiracy was afoot between Veris and General Veperyd

subject: Veris
fact: Veris is a High Inquisitor.
source_quote: High Inquisitor Veris

subject: Veris
fact: Veris was referenced in a deception by Daein involving a conspiracy.
source_quote: believing a conspiracy was afoot between Veris and General Veperyd

subject: General Veperyd
fact: General Veperyd was referenced in a deception by Daein involving a conspiracy.
source_quote: believing a conspiracy was afoot between Veris and General Veperyd

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass desires The Lexicon of Oaths.
source_quote: It is desired by Maram il Vass

subject: Graz'zt
fact: Graz'zt is a demon lord.
source_quote: the demon lord Graz'zt

subject: Graz'zt
fact: Graz'zt's voice was mimicked by Daein to deceive the Cambion guards.
source_quote: mimic the terrifying voice of the demon lord Graz'zt to deceive the Cambion guards

subject: Cambion guards
fact: Cambion guards were deceived by Daein's Minor Illusion into abandoning their posts.
source_quote: deceive the Cambion guards into abandoning their posts

subject: Cambion guards
fact: Cambion guards were present near the incapacitated giant.
source_quote: approach the incapacitated giant and the cambion guards undetected

subject: Owlbear
fact: An Owlbear caused a rampage during the dinner.
source_quote: distracted by the Owlbear's rampage

subject: Mulmaster's hierarchy
fact: Mulmaster's hierarchy conducted years of investigation triggered by the sale of the divination artifact.
source_quote: triggering years of investigation by Mulmaster's hierarchy

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning contains upper vaults accessible by a runic key.
source_quote: grants access to the upper vaults of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: upper vaults
fact: The upper vaults of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning contain The Lexicon of Oaths.
source_quote: located within the upper vaults of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: obsidian dining table
fact: The runic key was dangling loose on the obsidian dining table during the dinner.
source_quote: dangling loose on the obsidian dining table during the chaos of the dinner

subject: obsidian dining table
fact: The runic key was pulled across the obsidian dining table by Daein.
source_quote: pull the runic key across the obsidian dining table

subject: Six-Fingered Courtyard
fact: The party retreated from the Six-Fingered Courtyard.
source_quote: retreated from the Six-Fingered Courtyard

subject: Magical Token
fact: A magical token was used by Felkur to cast a high-potency sleep spell.
source_quote: A specialized item used by Felkur to cast a high-potency sleep spell

subject: Magical Token
fact: Four magical tokens remained after Felkur used one.
source_quote: left Felkur with four tokens remaining

subject: Portable Hole
fact: A portable hole was equipped with a custom-built breathing apparatus.
source_quote: equipped with a custom-built breathing apparatus

subject: Portable Hole
fact: The party used the portable hole to hide the unconscious and shrunken fire giant Brandyr.
source_quote: used by the party to hide the unconscious and shrunken fire giant Brandyr

subject: Reduction Scroll
fact: Two reduction scrolls were used to shrink the fire giant Brandyr.
source_quote: Two scrolls were used to reduce her by two size categories

subject: Reduction Scroll
fact: The reduction scrolls reduced Brandyr by two size categories.
source_quote: reduce her by two size categories

subject: Runic Key
fact: A runic key grants access to the upper vaults of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: grants access to the upper vaults of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Runic Key
fact: The runic key was snatched by the party using telekinesis.
source_quote: snatched by the party using telekinesis

subject: Seeming Scroll
fact: The party held a Seeming Scroll as a backup plan to disguise themselves as servants.
source_quote: A magical scroll held by the party as a backup plan to disguise themselves as servants

subject: The Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is a powerful book located within the upper vaults of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: A powerful book located within the upper vaults of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: The Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is desired by Maram il Vass.
source_quote: It is desired by Maram il Vass

subject: The Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is believed to contain information exposing Felkur's true identity.
source_quote: believed to contain information that could expose Felkur's true identity

subject: Divination Artifact
fact: A divination artifact grants perfect divination and protection from scrying.
source_quote: It grants perfect divination and protection from scrying

subject: Divination Artifact
fact: The divination artifact was sold for 45 gold pieces.
source_quote: sold it for 45 gold pieces

subject: sleep spell
fact: Felkur cast a sleep spell that incapacitated the fire giant Brandyr.
source_quote: successfully incapacitated the fire giant Brandyr

subject: reduce spell
fact: Bramgrim and Daein cast the Reduce spell twice on Brandyr.
source_quote: A transmutation spell cast twice — by Bramgrim and Daein

subject: reduce spell
fact: No saving throw was required for the Reduce spell because Brandyr was incapacitated.
source_quote: Because Brandyr was incapacitated, no saving throw was required

subject: Nature's Veil
fact: Akritas used Nature's Veil to become invisible as a bonus action.
source_quote: used by Akritas to become invisible as a bonus action

subject: Pass Without Trace
fact: Akritas cast Pass Without Trace to mask the party's movements and sounds.
source_quote: masking their movements and sounds

subject: Minor Illusion
fact: Daein used Minor Illusion to mimic the voice of Graz'zt.
source_quote: first by Daein to mimic the terrifying voice of the demon lord Graz'zt

subject: Minor Illusion
fact: Daein used Minor Illusion to mimic the voice of High Inquisitor Veris.
source_quote: later to mimic the voice of High Inquisitor Veris

subject: Telekinetic Movement
fact: Daein used Telekinetic Movement to pull the runic key into the party's possession.
source_quote: into the party's possession while the hosts were distracted

subject: Owlbear rampage
fact: The hosts were distracted by the Owlbear's rampage.
source_quote: while the hosts were distracted by the Owlbear's rampage
